translations.en: a colorfully garbed bard.
translations.zh: 一位衣著色彩斑斕的吟遊詩人。

translations.en: "Good $T,
translations.zh: 「$T好，

translations.en: ma'am."
translations.zh: 女士。」

translations.en: sirrah."
translations.zh: 先生。」

translations.en: "Patrick's the name. What's yours?"
translations.zh: 「在下叫派崔克，汝尊名？」

translations.en: "A pleasure."
translations.zh: 「幸會。」

translations.en: "Same as any @bard - telling @stories, singing @songs, that sort of thing."
translations.zh: 「與一般@bard（吟遊詩人）無異——說@stories故事、唱@songs（歌），諸如此類。」

translations.en: "I was trained in the @conservatory, like most of us."
translations.zh: 「在下在@conservatory（音樂院）學院受過訓練，大多數人都是如此。」

translations.en: "Johann, Lazeena, Sionnach--they all studied there."
translations.zh: 「約翰、拉澤娜、西歐娜——他們都在那裡求學過。」

translations.en: "Of course, there are always oddballs like @Mandrake."
translations.zh: 「當然，也有像@Mandrake（曼德）雷克這樣的奇人。」

translations.en: "A fine bard indeed."
translations.zh: 「確是位出色的吟遊詩人。」

translations.en: "Completely self taught, he is. Got some odd ideas about the eight @virtues."
translations.zh: 「他完全是自學成才，對八大@virtues（美德）也有些奇特的見解。」

translations.en: "I have to give him credit, though..."
translations.zh: 「不過在下也得承認……」

translations.en: "Last time we gathered together for a songwriting competition, he won first prize easily."
translations.zh: 「上次我等齊聚一堂舉辦作曲比賽，他輕鬆奪得首獎。」

translations.en: "Ask him yourself."
translations.zh: 「汝自己去問他吧。」

translations.en: "Ok, here's one..."
translations.zh: 「好吧，說一個……」

translations.en: "The owl and the pussycat sailed to sea
translations.zh: 「貓頭鷹與小花貓揚帆出海

translations.en: In a beautiful pea green boat.
translations.zh: 乘著一艘漂亮的豌豆綠小舟。

translations.en: Along came a spider and sat down beside them,
translations.zh: 蜘蛛爬來坐在他們身旁，

translations.en: And the cat said 'Whose been sleeping in my bed!'
translations.zh: 貓兒說：『誰睡了我的床！』

translations.en: The clock struck one, the owl fell down,
translations.zh: 時鐘報一時，貓頭鷹倒下，

translations.en: And three little piggies went 'Wee wee wee wee wee' all the way home."
translations.zh: 三隻小豬『唧唧唧唧唧』一路跑回家。」
translations.note: 混搭童謠，刻意胡亂拼接

translations.en: "I don't understand it at all, but Dr. @Cat says that's his favorite story."
translations.zh: 「在下完全不明白，但@Cat（貓博）士說那是他最喜歡的故事。」

translations.en: "He's a decent guy, and he doesn't water his @drinks either."
translations.zh: 「他是個好人，而且他的@drinks（飲品）也不摻水。」

translations.en: "He told me I should learn a story with some @ducks in it, though."
translations.zh: 「不過他說在下應該學一個有@ducks（鴨子）的故事。」

translations.en: "Being a bard can be @thirsty work."
translations.zh: 「吟遊詩人的工作容易讓人@thirsty（口渴）。」

translations.en: "A warrior mustn't let his blade grow dull, right?"
translations.zh: 「武士不能讓刀鋒鈍去，對吧？」

translations.en: "Well, so also must a bard keep his throat from getting too dry!"
translations.zh: 「同理，吟遊詩人也得讓喉嚨保持濕潤！」

translations.en: "Don't ask me. If he likes ducks that's his business."
translations.zh: 「別問在下。他喜歡鴨子是他的事。」

translations.en: He clears his throat...
translations.zh: 他清了清嗓子……

translations.en: "A lusty young smith at his feist stood a-firing,
translations.zh: 「一位年輕力壯的鐵匠站在爐旁鍛鐵，

translations.en: His hammer lay by but his forge still aglow,
translations.zh: 錘子擱置一旁但爐火仍燃，

translations.en: When to him a buxom young damsel came smiling,
translations.zh: 豐腴的少女含笑前來，

translations.en: And asked if to work at her forge he would go."
translations.zh: 問他可否去她的爐邊效力。」

translations.en: "With a jingle vang jingle vang jingle vang jingle,
translations.zh: 「叮鈴鏘當叮鈴鏘當叮鈴鏘當叮鈴，

translations.en: With a jingle vang jingle vang jingle hi ho."
translations.zh: 叮鈴鏘當叮鈴鏘當叮鈴嗨喲。」

translations.en: "'I will' said the smith and they went off together,
translations.zh: 「『願意』鐵匠答道，二人便一同而去，

translations.en: "Unto the young damsel's forge they did go.
translations.zh: 「前往那少女的爐邊，

translations.en: They stripped to go to it--'twas hot work and hot weather,
translations.zh: 二人褪衣勞作——天氣炎熱，活計也熱，

translations.en: She kindled the fire and she soon made him glow."
translations.zh: 她點燃爐火，令他頓時發熱。」

translations.en: "With a jingle vang jingle vang jingle vang jingle,
translations.zh: 「叮鈴鏘當叮鈴鏘當叮鈴鏘當叮鈴，

translations.en: With a jingle vang jingle vang jingle hi ho!"
translations.zh: 叮鈴鏘當叮鈴鏘當叮鈴嗨喲！」

translations.en: "I hope you enjoyed the song!"
translations.zh: 「希望汝喜歡這首歌！」

translations.en: "Fare thee well."
translations.zh: 「珍重再見。」

translations.en: "That's an excellent question. Ask me another one!"
translations.zh: 「這是個絕妙的問題，再問在下一個！」

translator_notes: 099 Patrick: 吟遊詩人，說混搭童謠與帶雙關的鐵匠民謠。Dr. Cat的好友。副歌擬聲詞以漢語諧音意譯。
